description:
You are an IT administrator performing a routine system health audit of the Emoncms energy monitoring platform (http://localhost/). Gather system information from the admin panel (http://localhost/admin) and other relevant pages to create a plain-text report at /home/ga/system_health_report.txt. The report must follow this format (one key-value pair per line):

EMONCMS_VERSION: <version>
MYSQL_VERSION: <version>
PHP_VERSION: <version>
REDIS_STATUS: <Connected or Disconnected>
MQTT_STATUS: <Disabled, Connected, or Disconnected>
FEED_COUNT: <integer>
INPUT_COUNT: <integer>

You are logged in as admin.
